SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.costestimation

Enum Class EstimateClass

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<EstimateClass>
neqsim.process.costestimation.EstimateClass
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<EstimateClass>, Constable
public enum EstimateClass extends Enum<EstimateClass>
AACE-style estimate classes for NeqSim cost estimates.

The classes indicate estimate maturity and typical accuracy range. They are used to prevent early screening estimates from being reported as detailed vendor or quantity-takeoff estimates.

Version:
1.0
Author:
esol

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    CLASS_1
    Final estimate based mainly on vendor quotes and detailed quantities.
    CLASS_2
    Detailed estimate based on firm quantities and major quotes.
    CLASS_3
    Budget or FEED estimate based on sized equipment and bulk quantities.
    CLASS_4
    Study estimate based on equipment-specific correlations and factors.
    CLASS_5
    Concept screening estimate based on capacity factors or analogues.

  • Constructor Details

    • EstimateClass

      private EstimateClass(int classNumber, String maturity, double lowAccuracyFraction, double highAccuracyFraction, String defaultMethod)
      Creates an estimate class descriptor.
      Parameters:
      classNumber - the AACE class number from 1 to 5
      maturity - the maturity label
      lowAccuracyFraction - lower accuracy fraction, e.g. -0.30 for minus thirty percent
      highAccuracyFraction - upper accuracy fraction, e.g. 0.50 for plus fifty percent
      defaultMethod - the default estimating method normally associated with the class

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static EstimateClass[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static EstimateClass valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getClassNumber

      public int getClassNumber()
      Gets the AACE class number.
      Returns:
      class number from 1 to 5

      Gets the maturity label.
      Returns:

    • getDefaultMethod

      public String getDefaultMethod()
      Gets the default estimating method.
      Returns:
      default method identifier

    • fromClassNumber

      public static EstimateClass fromClassNumber(int classNumber)
      Resolves an estimate class by its numeric AACE class.
      Parameters:
      classNumber - the class number from 1 to 5
      Returns:
      the matching estimate class
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the class number is outside 1 to 5
